scenario: ExecutionReport submitted with post-task git status but no pre-task git status, violating review-006 Pre/Post Status Required rule. Reviewer cannot verify the diff is clean because the baseline is missing.
input_report_features: Report includes post git-status but omits pre git-status. The report claims 'no unexpected changes' without showing what the starting state was. Fake report says 'Status: submitted' with a summary claiming all changes are approved, but only one git status snapshot is attached.
expected_findings: Cannot verify that changes are only to approved paths
review-006 violation: pre/post status pair not provided
Evidence chain broken: claim of 'no unexpected changes' is unverifiable
